body_txt: A character (usually female) with no nudity taboo, who doesn't understand the concept that not wearing clothes is considered indecent. This can be justified any number of ways, but nine times out of ten, it's really for Fanservice . The In-Universe reason is usually that she is from a culture with either no nudity taboo , or differing ones . Her home culture often results in plenty of differing values besides this, but the nudity serves as a quick, easily-noticed demonstration of her unfamiliar mindset. Some versions include:  Often such characters are Naked on Arrival ; it's not unheard of for a work to use the two tropes together to add a Fanservice Non-Sequitur, and then never mention it again (e.g. she has one nudity-related incident, gets the taboo explained to her, and never has any further incidents). Note that No Nudity Taboo can frequently be found in characters that are ostensibly inhuman enough to not need clothing , like Exposed Extraterrestrials , certain furries or weres (with or without Non-Mammal Mammaries ), or pixies . (For a specific example, think of the Zora in the Zelda series.) However, this is actually so overwhelmingly commonplace with these inhuman characters that it usually averts this trope, because the nudity never comes up even subtextually. The work itself basically doesn't even register it as Fanservice . (Unless if the character ever shapeshifts into a normal human . At that point, the character's nudity is a very serious problem that must be addressed, immediately.) The one version of this trope that doesn't involve the character having some sort of overall culture incongruency is when she is a Sugar-and-Ice Girl and/or Genki Girl who has exempt a Childhood Friend from her nudity taboo like an inverted Single-Target Sexuality . Since they've known each other for years, it doesn't register to her that she might be attractive to him now, even though he has realized this , whether he likes it or not . As a common evolution of this variant, the first outward symptom of a growing attraction or romantic awareness is when she does start caring about him watching. Closely related to Shameless Fanservice Girl , a character without a nudity taboo but who still understands the concept, and Reluctant Fanservice Girl , a character with a nudity taboo thrust into a universe that conspires to make her show as much skin as possible. Our Nudity Is Different is when there is a nudity taboo, but it's different enough that the character is naked by the local standard. National Geographic Nudity is this trope applied to society rather than an individual. Not Distracted by the Sexy is basically the reverse of this when the other people in-series aren't noticing the Fanservice of that character. For rough Spear Counterparts , see the Clueless Chick-Magnet and Oblivious Pervert .
